faqs.question: How do I book an appointment at Reliance Foundation Hospitals?
faqs.answer: Use the appointment button or call 9508655628. The team will help you choose a convenient consultation time.

faqs.question: What services does Reliance Foundation Hospitals offer?
faqs.answer: Reliance Foundation Hospitals supports patients with Doctor Consultation, Emergency Care, Specialist Departments, Diagnostics, Patient Care Services.

faqs.question: Can I ask questions before visiting?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can call, email, or use WhatsApp to ask about availability, services, and the best next step for your needs.

faqs.question: Where is the clinic located?
faqs.answer: Reliance Foundation Hospitals is located at Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

aboutText: Reliance Foundation Hospitals is a premium hospital concept in Mumbai, designed to present services, build patient trust, and make enquiries simple through a modern digital experience.
contactBlurb: Get in touch to schedule an appointment or ask a question.

home.servicesCopy: We offer a thoughtful range of dental services tailored to your goals.
home.doctorSectionBody: Experienced, attentive care focused on comfort, clarity, and long-term oral health.
home.galleryCopy: A look at the care environment patients experience from consultation through follow-up.
home.faqCopy: Quick answers to help patients feel clear before they book.
home.whyChooseUsCopy: A modern practice built around patient comfort, clear treatment planning, and dependable care.
home.testimonialsCopy: Read what our patients say about their experience.

about.heroCopy: We focus on calm, patient-centered care and treatment planning.
about.philosophyCopy: Our approach is built around trust, comfort, and long-term results.

services.heroCopy: From preventive care to restorative and cosmetic procedures, we support your smile goals.
